title: Signed Inference Receipt (SIR) — Wire Format v2
description: Canonical JSON Schema for a v=2 Signed Inference Receipt. See https://docs.vdmnexus.com/docs/spec/sir-v2 for the full specification.

v.description: Wire format version. MUST be the integer 2 on a conformant v=2 receipt.

agent_pubkey.description: Base58-encoded Ed25519 public key of the agent. On Solana this is identical to the agent's wallet address.

model.description: Model identifier as routed by the operator. Free-form; operator-defined.

cost_usdc.description: Actual upstream cost (USD) paid by the operator. NOT the amount charged to the agent — that is payment.amount_usdc on the x402 variant.

prompt_hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the prompt. Construction depends on the request shape — see spec §10.

response_hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the response text. Construction depends on the request shape — see spec §10.

timestamp.description: Operator wall-clock at receipt construction, milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

inference_id.description: Operator-side row identifier (e.g. a database id). MAY be null if the operator failed to persist the row but issued a receipt regardless.

points_total.description: Cumulative points attributed to this agent_pubkey by the operator, including this call. The operator signs this field but a verifier MUST NOT treat it as a cryptographic claim about external state — only as the operator's own assertion.

nexus_signature.description: Base58-encoded Ed25519 detached signature by the operator key over the canonical JSON of this receipt with `nexus_signature` excluded. See spec §8 and §9.

provider.description: Prepaid variant only. Operator-defined routing tag (e.g. "openrouter:fast").

balance_remaining.description: Prepaid variant only. Operator-credit balance remaining after this debit (USD).

upstream.description: x402 variant only. Inference provider name (e.g. "openrouter").

scheme.description: Payment scheme identifier. MUST be "x402" on this variant.

amount_usdc.description: Amount paid by the agent (USD). Anchored by the verifier to an on-chain token-balance delta.

tx_signature.description: Blockchain transaction signature. On Solana this is the base58 transaction signature.

network.description: CAIP-2 network identifier. Conformant operators MUST use the genesis-hash form (e.g. "solana:EtWTRABZaYq6iMfeYKouRu166VU2xqa1aFoKMcMZ9YTs"). Short forms (e.g. "solana:devnet") are non-normative and MAY be accepted by tolerant verifiers.

pay_to.description: Recipient address that received the payment. Verifiers MUST confirm a token-balance delta to this address of at least amount_usdc.

oneOf.title: SirPrepaid
oneOf.description: Prepaid variant — settlement via operator-credit ledger.

oneOf.title: SirX402
oneOf.description: x402 variant — per-call settlement on a blockchain.
